If I rent a car, I will see more of the country.
If it rains, I will drive slowly.
If the tank is low, we will stop for fuel.
I will follow the GPS if I get lost.
If there is a traffic jam, we will be late.
Good morning. I have a reservation. I would like to pick up my rental car, please.
Of course. Here are the keys. If you return the car with a full tank, you will not pay an extra fee.
Good to know. Does the price include insurance?
Yes, full insurance is included. If anything happens on the highway, just call this number.
Perfect. And if I get lost, will the navigation work in the mountains?
It will. Set your route before you start. If the signal drops, the map still guides you. Safe travels!

Welcome, and thank you for choosing our rental service. Here are a few simple tips for your trip. If you drive on the highway, please keep to the right lane unless you are passing another car. If the fuel tank is low, stop at a station early, because gas stations are rare in the mountains. If you hit a traffic jam in the city, just stay calm and follow the navigation on the GPS. And remember, if you return the car with a full tank, you will not pay an extra fee. Have a safe and pleasant trip on the road.

The first time I rented a car abroad, I was very nervous. I did not know the roads, and the steering wheel felt strange on the wrong side. But I told myself one thing: if I stay calm and trust the GPS, I will be fine. I planned my route the night before and checked the mileage on the map. On the highway, I kept to the right and let faster cars pass. By the end of the week, driving felt natural. Now I always say, if you rent a car, you will see parts of a country that buses and trains never reach.

First, Roberto goes to the rental desk and asks to pick up his car. Then the agent explains that if he returns the car with a full tank, he will not pay an extra fee. Next, she adds the insurance and gives him the keys. After that, Roberto sets his route on the GPS and checks the navigation. Finally, he drives onto the highway and starts his road trip.
